'''Cliff Nielsen''' is a fantasy and science fiction artist living in Los Angeles, California. Some of his notable illustrations include ''[[Star Wars]]'' and [[Wikipedia:The Chronicles of Narnia|''The Chronicles of Narnia'']].

{{Artist-stub}}

==Works==
